title: 7 Herbal Tinctures For Pertussis
description: Echinacea angustifolia tinctures contains alkylamides, glycosides, and phenolic acids, which are beneficial compounds for fighting pertussis, a severe coughing illness. Alkylamides have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and ease congestion in the lungs and airways. Glycosides, particularly echinacoside, have antiviral properties that target and destroy the Bordetella pertussis bacteria, which causes pertussis.
